columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

extraction_method: transcribe from paper or digitize from Figure 3
triple_check: rp bins match those shown in Figure 3 of Guo+2018
wp values match the observed data points in Figure 3
note their pi_max value from Section 2
notes: Planck 2015 cosmology. Published best-fit from Table 2 of Guo+2018.
